name: Busy Day Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onions.
2. Drain off excess fat.
3. Add the rest of the ingredients (mixed vegetables, tomatoes, tomato sauce, barley, sugar, and water) to a large pot.
4. Stir everything together and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and let simmer for at least 1 hour, stirring occasionally until tender.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste before serving.
